programmes.show_description: Fast-paced action with Dave Bautista. When a US-based military force invades their Brooklyn neighbourhood, 20-year-old Lucy and war veteran Stupe must depend on each other to survive.
Action with David Carradine. As the Vietnam War comes to an end, one man embarks on a life-threatening mission to free a group of American prisoners held in a secret Vietcong camp.

A small business owner claims her marketing manager did not deliver what he promised; she accuses him of tampering with her negative online review.
A man's access to car auctions gets him in trouble with an old friend when a car deal falls apart.
A woman sues her son for unpaid rent and damages to a home she rented to him.
Trailer park owners sue a former tenant for spreading alleged lies that bedbugs were running rampant on their property.
A woman accuses her caregiver of running a pet sitting business on the side; the caregiver claims the senior committed extortion.
A woman, her husband and her three children move in with her sister, live for free and then sue her for unpaid credit card charges.
After two years of living on the streets, a man claims his new 'garage home' was upended with an allegedly false restraining order and illegal eviction.
After meeting online, two women end up fighting over missing business property, a shared car and the 'gift' of an iPhone.
After smelling marijuana, a landlord confronts her tenants and tells them to move out; a teen insists that he has a license to imbibe because of chronic shoulder pain.

Police divers training in Loch Lomond, Scotland, discover human body parts. Detectives face a battle to put the killer behind bars as the prime suspect flees.
A murdered US woman is found in a duffle-bag washed up on the Florida coast. Her married, military lover is the prime suspect - and a single gold earring seals his fate.
After Angela Craig died, her autopsy revealed she had been poisoned and police claimed the evidence pointed to her husband.
Using clever investigative techniques, police uncover a series of bizarre events surrounding the death of a woman that was shot in the back.
Without a Prayer: Analysing the evidence, the medical detectives solve real crimes using forensic techniques, alongside reconstructions (which may be unsuitable for younger viewers).

Chuck Norris fights crime and helps the community as the eponymous Walker. Walker investigates further after Trivette apparently shot a child during the apprehension of some suspects.
Fact-based thriller with Jason Statham. During a heist, a London bank robber accidentally steals top-secret files that the government and security services are determined to keep buried.
Crime thriller with Robert De Niro. After a disastrous attempt to rob a casino belonging to a powerful crime boss, two criminals are forced to hijack a bus as they try to make a getaway.
Drama with Harvey Keitel. A corrupt detective sees a chance to redeem himself while investigating the rape of a young nun - though he struggles to comprehend how she can forgive her attackers.
Blood-sucking Hammer horror with Christopher Lee. A young man and his girlfriend travel to Dracula's mountain-top castle in search of his brother who disappeared in mysterious circumstances.

A woman takes a weekend course to learn how to apply permanent make-up; she ends up suing the beauty company for pain and suffering.
An agoraphobic woman bonds with a rescued dog only to discover that her beloved new companion has a previous owner who wants her pet back.
A mistake made by payroll accidentally doubles a young man's salary; he neglects to tell anyone and is sued for overpayment.
A man sues his colleague for unpaid services regarding the translation of his book into Portuguese.
When a Texas windstorm throws shopping trollies all over a car park, a woman claims a fellow shopper's buggy slammed into her car.
A man, who couldn't pay 30k in bail money, spends nine months in jail after being set up by his ex-boyfriend who called the police on him on Christmas Eve
A married couple sue their daughter's boyfriend for allegedly losing their dog and stealing their belongings while he was house sitting.
When a man's ex-girlfriend accuses him of pulling a gun on her, he files a protective order and sues for a false arrest.
A woman gets pregnant two weeks after her boyfriend gets out of jail; he accuses her of cheating. She sues for money she allegedly sent to him in prison.

A body is found floating at a dock in a North Florida creek. US Police initially suspect a motive of robbery, but the victim's complex love life suggests otherwise.
A drought at a French lake reveals a sunken Toyota holding the body of a UK expat who's been missing for two years. Her controlling husband becomes police's prime suspect.
In 2001, a California mother and wife, Jane Dorotik, was convicted of murdering her husband but always maintained her innocence.
A teenage girl uses her own knowledge of forensics to help police track down her abductor.

Chuck Norris is Walker in this modern, high-kicking martial arts western. Carlos' undercover operation soon becomes a murder investigation...
Crime thriller with Al Pacino. Small-time crook Tony Montana emigrates from Cuba to Miami and becomes a powerful drug baron, but his empire is threatened by his paranoia and cocaine addiction.
